message:
fix: Saturating arithmetic in drawing primitives and terminal writer

- drawing.rs: Replace bare + and - with saturating_add/saturating_sub for
  border/box coordinate computations (top+1, bottom-1, right-1)
- terminal_writer.rs: Replace bare + with saturating_add for ANSI cursor
  positioning (0-indexed to 1-indexed conversion)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
